case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. HENRY LOUIE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, HENRY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-2019
